questions.q: How should you treat your Certificate of Naturalization?
options: Store the original safely and keep copies
Laminate and use it as ID everywhere
Throw it away after the ceremony
questions.explanation: It is costly to replace, so protect the original.

questions.q: Which new right should a new citizen act on first?
questions.explanation: Registering to vote is a key new right of citizenship.

questions.q: What document can a new citizen apply for that proves citizenship and allows international travel?
questions.explanation: Apply for a passport using the Certificate of Naturalization.

questions.q: Which records should a new citizen update?
questions.explanation: Update the Social Security Administration to reflect citizenship.

questions.q: Which is a way to begin civic life?
options: Learn your representatives and follow elections
questions.explanation: Engaging locally and voting are part of active citizenship.
